mapper.sql: id, accid, user_id AS userId, deduction, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') as thisMouth, sum(deduction) pay FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id =#{id} GROUP BY thisMouth

SELECT b.id id, b.address address, a.create_time createTime, a.deduction money, b.thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl FROM app_push_bill AS a LEFT JOIN app_accident_record AS b ON a.accid = b.id WHERE a.user_id =#{id}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') as thisMouth, sum(deduction) pay FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id =#{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y%m') = #{date} GROUP BY thisMouth

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT id ,accid,user_id userId,deduction,source,create_time createTime,update_time updateTime,CONCAT(1)type,CONCAT('') address,CONCAT('') thumbnailUrl,track_state trackState from app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND is_claim = 1
AND state = #{state}
AND check_time is not null
AND check_time is null
AND reward is not null
union ALL
SELECT a.id,a.id accid,user_b_id userId,CONCAT('')deduction,CONCAT('')source , a.create_time createTime,a.update_time updateTime,CONCAT(2)type,adress address,CONCAT('') thumbnailUrl,track_state trackState FROM app_send_out_sheet as a WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND state = #{state} )as t ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT DISTINCT a.id ,accid,a.user_id userId,deduction,a.source,a.create_time createTime,a.update_time updateTime,CONCAT(1)type,CONCAT('') address,CONCAT('') thumbnailUrl,track_state trackState from app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id WHERE b.type = 1 AND a.user_id = #{id} AND is_claim = 1
AND b.vehicle_results = 3
AND b.vehicle_results = 4
AND b.vehicle_results = 2
AND a.remark is not null
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT a.id id,a.id accid,a.user_b_id userId,CONCAT('')deduction,CONCAT('')source , a.create_time createTime,a.update_time updateTime,CONCAT(2)type,adress address,CONCAT('') thumbnailUrl,track_state trackState FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c ON a.id = c.mess_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{id} AND c.type = 2 AND c.vehicle_results = #{state} )as t
ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 0,20

SELECT SUM(if(((a.track_state = 1 or a.track_state = 2) ),1,0)) newTask, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 1 ),1,0)) agree, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 2 ),1,0)) trackAgain, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 3 ),1,0)) refuse FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 2 WHERE a.user_b_id = #{bid}

SELECT DISTINCT SUM(if(((a.track_state = 1 or a.track_state = 2) ),1,0)) newTask, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 1 ),1,0)) agree, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 2 ),1,0)) trackAgain, SUM(if((b.vehicle_results = 3 ),1,0)) refuse FROM app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 1 WHERE user_id = #{bid}
SELECT url,`index` type FROM app_send_url WHERE type = 2 and source = 1 AND send_id = #{id}
SELECT count(1) newTask FROM app_push_bill WHERE state = 1 AND user_id = #{bid} AND is_claim = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 1 WHERE user_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 3 AND is_claim = 1)a

SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 1 WHERE user_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 4 AND is_claim = 1)a
SELECT count(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE remark is not null AND user_id = #{bid}
SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 2 WHERE a.user_b_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 3) a
SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 2 WHERE a.user_b_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 4) a
SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 2 WHERE a.user_b_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 1) a
SELECT count(1) newTask FROM app_push_bill WHERE check_time is not null AND user_id = #{bid} AND is_claim = 1
SELECT count(1) newTask FROM app_push_bill WHERE check_time is null AND user_id = #{bid} AND is_claim = 1
SELECT count(1) newTask FROM app_push_bill WHERE reward is not null AND user_id = #{bid}

SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 1 WHERE user_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 2 AND is_claim = 1)a
SELECT COUNT(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id id FROM app_send_out_sheet as a LEFT JOIN app_message_car as b on a.id = b.mess_id AND b.type = 2 WHERE a.user_b_id = #{bid} AND b.vehicle_results = 2) a
SELECT * FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND accid = #{s}
